requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability - GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Samoa's EV charging direction should be treated as IEC-aligned, influenced by Australia/New Zealand legacy practice, IEC equipment availability, right-hand-drive import patterns, and Pacific island infrastructure norms. AC charging should be specified around IEC 62196-2 Type 2, while DC fast charging should be specified around IEC 62196-3 CCS2 unless a project owner explicitly requires a multi-standard outlet. North American J1772 practice should not be assumed as Samoa's primary direction for new public infrastructure.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚电动汽车充电方向应按IEC体系处理，受澳大利亚/新西兰既有实践、IEC设备可得性、右舵进口车辆结构及太平洋岛国基础设施惯例影响。交流充电应围绕IEC 62196-2 Type 2规格确定，直流快充应围绕IEC 62196-3 CCS2确定，除非项目业主明确要求多标准接口。不应假定北美J1772实践是萨摩亚新建公共基础设施的主要方向。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞電動汽車充電方向應按IEC體系處理，受澳大利亞/新西蘭既有實踐、IEC設備可得性、右舵進口車輛結構及太平洋島國基礎設施慣例影響。交流充電應圍繞IEC 62196-2 Type 2規格確定，直流快充應圍繞IEC 62196-3 CCS2確定，除非項目業主明確要求多標準接口。不應假定北美J1772實踐是薩摩亞新建公共基礎設施的主要方向。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 - AC vehicle couplers including Type 2
IEC 62196-3 - DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers including CCS2 configuration FF
IEC 61851-1 - EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC and IEC Type 2 differ in connector gender, signaling details, and contact arrangement; GB/T DC is geometrically and electrically different from CCS2 and uses GB/T 27930 CAN communication. A GB/T-only charger is therefore physically and protocol incompatible with Samoa Type 2 / CCS2 deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩使用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充使用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口与IEC Type 2在接口性别、信号细节和触点排列上不同；GB/T直流接口与CCS2在几何和电气上不同，并使用GB/T 27930 CAN通信。因此，仅支持GB/T的充电桩与萨摩亚Type 2 / CCS2部署在物理和协议层面不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁使用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充使用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口與IEC Type 2在接口性別、信號細節和觸點排列上不同；GB/T直流接口與CCS2在幾何和電氣上不同，並使用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊。因此，僅支持GB/T的充電樁與薩摩亞Type 2 / CCS2部署在物理和協議層面不兼容。

gap.en: Conversion from China GB/T to Samoa IEC infrastructure requires hardware redesign of couplers, cable assemblies, locks, temperature sensing, control-pilot/proximity-pilot circuits, labels, spare parts, and DC communication where CCS2 is required. Adapters should not be treated as a substitute for project-compliant Type 2 / CCS2 design. Confirm connector requirements with the EPC-connected project owner, fleet operator, or charge-point operator before quoting.
gap.zh: 从中国GB/T转换为萨摩亚IEC基础设施，需要重新设计耦合器、电缆组件、锁止、温度感测、控制导引/接近导引电路、标签、备件，以及在要求CCS2时的直流通信。转接器不应被视为符合项目要求的Type 2 / CCS2设计替代品。报价前应与接入EPC的项目业主、车队运营方或充电点运营商确认接口要求。
gap.zht: 從中國GB/T轉換為薩摩亞IEC基礎設施，需要重新設計耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止、溫度感測、控制導引/接近導引電路、標籤、備件，以及在要求CCS2時的直流通訊。轉接器不應被視為符合項目要求的Type 2 / CCS2設計替代品。報價前應與接入EPC的項目業主、車隊運營方或充電點運營商確認接口要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is specified by the project owner, EPC-connected site, fleet operator, or tender; GB/T connectors are physically incompatible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Samoa-facing chargers should be specified for IEC 62196 Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC unless the project explicitly says otherwise. China GB/T connectors require hardware and protocol redesign and cannot be treated as plug-compatible; do not assume North American J1772 is the default route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向萨摩亚的充电桩应按IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流规格确定，除非项目另有明确要求。中国GB/T接口需要硬件和协议重新设计，不能视为可直接插接兼容；不应假定北美J1772是默认路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向薩摩亞的充電樁應按IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流規格確定，除非項目另有明確要求。中國GB/T接口需要硬件和協議重新設計，不能視為可直接插接兼容；不應假定北美J1772是默認路徑。
